name: Tower of Madness
short_description: A cowboy named John is compelled by an insidious voice in his head to ascend an inverted floating tower. Encounter atmospheric horror, defy gravity, and make impossible choices in this third-person psychological horror game inspired by Stephen King's The Dark Tower.
detailed_description:
Tower of Madness blends tense exploration, gravity-defying environments, and chilling encounters to keep players on edge.

The average time to complete one play-through is 45 minutes.

Atmospheric Stylized Horror: Experience chilling environments filled with terrifying monsters, all brought to life through a unique and immersive art style.

Gravity Manipulation: Use red magical glyphs to flip gravity and navigate between ceiling and floor. Progressing through mind-bending environments.

Inspired by H.P. Lovecraft & Stephen King's The Dark Tower series. An atmospheric, narrative-driven third-person horror game with a distinctive voice and unsettling twists.

More Features

  • Player Choices Matter: Make choices in dialogue and Quick Time Events (QTEs) that determine the fate of John. Discover 1 of 3 different game endings based on your actions.

  • Discover the past: Find 10 hidden notes to uncover the dark past of the tower.

  • Collect & Solve: Gather keys to unlock new areas and body parts to break through infinite looping hallways.

  • Quick Time Events: QTE's keep you involved in the action and horror during cutscenes!

  • Engaging Storyline: Follow John on his journey as he faces the darkest corners of his own mind. Fully voice-acted cutscenes add depth to this compelling narrative.

Story

John has lived all his life in a small, desert town. One fateful day, he starts hearing a sinister voice inside his head. This voice preempts a horrific event—the murder of everyone John knows, right before his eyes. With nowhere else to turn, John is compelled to follow the voice, descending into a dry well that reveals a cavern containing an ominous, inverted floating tower. The voice tells John to follow his crows and ascend this mysterious structure.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
*languages with full audio support
